title: Croatian Fajita Skewers
description: A flavorful and colorful dish that combines the best of Croatian and Mexican cuisine. The tangy fajita seasoning pairs perfectly with the crispy Croatian sausage, while the skewers add a fun twist to the traditional recipe.
instructions: Cut the Croatian sausage into 1-inch pieces and thread them onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Thread the bell peppers and onions onto the skewers, alternating with the sausage.
In a small bowl, mix together the fajita seasoning and lime juice.
Brush the skewers with the fajita seasoning mixture, making sure to coat all the ingredients evenly.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the sausage is cooked through and the vegetables are tender.
Brush the skewers with the tangy BBQ sauce, if using.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
